name: _advprec_softmax_fp8_tail
note: Red-team class-3 (softmax+FP8) entry for precision_verification.md. Validates the ABSTAIN path, not a catch. kernel.py computes tail probabilities wrong (30% of true). In fp32 the error is real (~5e-4, a tight/downstream judge sees it); in FP8 the tail flushes below resolution so the error is EXACTLY 0 -- no tolerance or distribution recovers it. Correct verdict = abstain (downstream/task-level), not PASS. Yardstick: tests/advprec_fp8_demo.py. Classifier routes FP8 output -> low_bit -> J3/abstain.

precision_recheck.reason: low-bit output (fp8/fp4/int4): sub-resolution errors round to 0, so no tolerance/distribution can separate correct from buggy. Route to a downstream / task-level check.
